title: Saranti Student Studio Thessaloniki Papanastasiou: Cozy 1

location.address: Alexandrou Papanastasiou & Michel Mitsaki, Thessaloniki 546 53, Greece

about.summary: Saranti student studio Thessaloniki Papanastasiou is a cozy private studio in Eastern Thessaloniki. This 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed studio is ideal for Erasmus students.

sections.title: 🏠 Saranti Student Studio Thessaloniki Papanastasiou – Modern Studio
sections.content: Saranti student studio Thessaloniki Papanastasiou — this cozy, fully equipped studio is designed for one tenant and features a double bed and a clean setup ideal for students seeking privacy in a newly constructed building.
highlights: Comfortable configuration: 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed layout for single occupancy.
Move-in ready: Modern private studio setup on the 2nd floor of a newly constructed building.
Fully equipped: Dedicated workspace, washing machine, private kitchenware, and Wi-Fi.

sections.title: 📍 Location in Eastern Thessaloniki
sections.content: Living in Eastern Thessaloniki near Papanastasiou makes commuting easy. Aristotle University and City College are within walking distance or reachable via direct bus routes from nearby bus stations.
highlights: Everything nearby: Local supermarkets, marketplaces, bakeries, cafes, and taverns are 50 meters away.
Erasmus housing: Well-positioned student housing setup in a quiet residential area.

sections.title: 🎓 Perfect for Erasmus Students & Nomads
sections.content:
This Saranti student studio Thessaloniki Papanastasiou is a top option for remote digital nomads and university students. For official info, visit Aristotle University and City College.

To compare other properties in the building, view our Papanastasiou balcony studio.

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content:
Maintenance, water, heating, and Wi-Fi are included. Electricity is billed separately. A bi-weekly cleaning service is available for a small fee.

We look forward to welcoming you to Thessaloniki. Reach out via the contact host button.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Available for 1 person only. Smoking, pets, parties and children are not allowed. Electricity is paid separately.
